title: pelargonium × iconicum
intro: Pelargonium × iconicum, also known as the Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of digestive issues, anxiety, and stress, due to its rich content of flavonoids and essential oils. The health benefits of Pelargonium × iconicum include its ability to soothe digestive problems, promote relaxation, and provide anti-inflammatory effects. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to address a range of health concerns.
